note: Day 22 (Easter Saturday). 10-day BRAIN gap since last coordination run (Day 12, 2026-04-09). No LinkedIn activity today or Easter Monday 2026-04-21. First execution window: Tuesday 2026-04-22 from 07:00. All three warm-pipeline leads (1/3/22) remain in OUTCOME_UNKNOWN state — HANDS must resolve these on 2026-04-22 before any cold channel activity. Five leads have Day-14 breakup emails AND LinkedIn requests both due 2026-04-22 — LinkedIn goes first (07:00), breakups follow (09:00). This file supersedes all previous coordination decisions.

post_easter_workload_warning.instruction: Tuesday 2026-04-22 is the busiest day of the campaign. Suggested order: (1) IMAP sweep for warm pipeline leads 1/3/22 — resolve outcomes first, they may convert. (2) LinkedIn searches for 42/44/46/57/60 before 09:00. (3) Breakup email sends 09:00-10:15. (4) LinkedIn searches for 30/32/59/58/31 from 10:30. (5) Initiate Batch 5 Ryedale Google Maps scrape in the background. Do not skip any step — all are critical.

key_actions_ordered: 1. IMAP SWEEP (07:00 Tuesday): Check leads 1/3/22 for warm pipeline outcomes — these take absolute priority. Write outcomes to value_delivery_queue.json.

2. CRITICAL LINKEDIN (07:00-09:00): Lead 42 (Sarah, Blossom Beauty) → Lead 44 (Dr. Rowe, Meadowbrook Vets) → Lead 46 (Mike Thornfield, Thornfield Electricals) → Lead 57 (Mike Rawlings, Scarborough Bay Plumbing) → Lead 60 (James Hewitt, Pocklington Fine Furniture). LinkedIn before breakup emails.
3. BREAKUP EMAILS (09:00-10:15): fu_036/037/038/039/040 — pre-written, in followup_queue.json. IMAP check before each.

4. HIGH LINKEDIN (10:30+): Lead 30 (Steve, Halifax) → Lead 32 (Ann, Castleford) → Lead 59 (Tony, Scarborough Roofing) → Lead 58 (Old Court Solicitors, conditional) → Lead 31 (Pontefract Pharmacy, conditional).
5. BATCH 5 SCRAPE: Initiate Ryedale Google Maps scrape — do not defer again. 12-day pipeline gap. BRAIN will write copy on next run.
6. WEDNESDAY 2026-04-23: Breakup emails fu_041-045 at 09:00, then LinkedIn for leads 50/52/55/56.
7. Write data/linkedin_profiles.json after EVERY search — this is blocking BRAIN from upgrading all notes from generic to post_reference.
summary.channel_conflict_resolution: No email/LinkedIn same-day conflicts on 2026-04-22 except for the 5 CRITICAL leads where breakups and LinkedIn both occur. Resolution: LinkedIn goes out in the 07:00-09:00 window, breakups follow at 09:00. Different channels — not a conflict, but a planned coordinated double-touch.
summary.linkedin_profiles_escalation: FIVE consecutive BRAIN runs without linkedin_profiles.json. Blocking all note upgrades. Final escalation: if HANDS does not write linkedin_profiles.json after searches on 2026-04-22, BRAIN will be unable to improve any note quality for the remainder of this campaign's active leads. All sequences end by 2026-04-24 — this is the last opportunity.
